tasks.description: Add a proper .gitignore for Swift/SwiftUI macOS project with HID bridge, build artifacts, scraped website data, and macOS system files
tasks.acceptance: File .gitignore exists at repo root, covers .build/, .build-cache/, .dist/, .DS_Store, .tmp-saveweb/, saveweb2zip-com-typ-ing/, typ.ing.har, root-level scraped JS/CSS files, IDE files (.vscode/, .idea/, xcuserdata/), and .swarm/session/
